name: Laura
subject: did you get my text?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there - With less than six months to go, and the primary election just a few weeks away, election season is heating up here in Nevada. Jacky just joined Nevada Democrats to open a new field office for organizers and volunteers in Las Vegas. And this week, we launched our newest way to stay in touch - via text! I'm so excited about this.
**Want to get involved and help us turn Nevada blue, from wherever you are? Text ROSEN to 91990 to join our texting team.**
Dean Heller is the most vulnerable Senator up for re-election this year - and a new poll shows our race is neck and neck - so GOP Super PACs are gearing up to pour millions into Nevada. They know they HAVE to win here if they want to keep the Senate under Republican control.
So it's crucial that we're able to share breaking news updates, let you know about events in your area, and respond to attacks at a moment's notice. **There 's no better way to get involved!**

**Ready for insider updates? Text ROSEN to 91990 right now to help us defeat Dean Heller and retake the Senate for Democrats.**
Text you soon,

Laura
Digital Director, Rosen for Nevada

name: Tori Taylor
subject: Look what you helped build!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress ***
body:
"This is a totally different cycle than we've seen before in North Carolina and across the country, with unprecedented Democratic grassroots energy and enthusiasm, and NC-13 has all the ingredients to be a competitive race."
-- News and Record, 5/12/2018

Our campaign has attracted a lot of attention and generated a lot of excitement.

With each passing week, this race is growing exceedingly competitive. We're polling within single digits of Rep. Ted Budd and we've outraised him every quarter.

Now that the primary is over and we're set to face off against him, things are getting personal. Budd has already gone on the attack to distort my record and who I am.

But I'm ready.

I'm putting on my armor. His tired political tricks aren't going to put a dent in our momentum. The work we're doing and the values we're fighting for are far too important to be derailed by Rep. Budd and the special interests who pull his puppet strings.

I need to make sure we have the resources to fight back. And I need your help with that.

I'm asking if you can make a contribution so we can hit tomorrow night's FEC Mid-Quarter goal.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180514#

The more competitive this race grows, the more special interests will get involved to prop up Rep. Ted Budd.

The Congressional Leadership Fund is Paul Ryan's Super PAC and they have set up shop in this district to defeat us. Washington politicians and the special interests are lining up to repay Budd for signing off on their extreme agenda in Congress.

They know if they lose Budd, they lose one of their top allies in Congress. I'm not running to be at the beck and call of Paul Ryan or any Washington politician.

I'm running because North Carolina families deserve a Representative who will put them first.

But I can't do this without you. This race could come down to a handful of votes in November.

Rush in $5, $10, or give whatever you can so we can pull ahead of Ted Budd and his Washington-first agenda.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180514#

Thank you,

Kathy

*** Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress ***

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to unsubscribe: https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe

www.kathymanning2018.com

name: Team Downing
subject: FW: This is it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
Did you see Troy’s message yesterday? This is the last end-of-month deadline our campaign faces before the primary on June 5th, and we need your help to raise $15,000 so we can fully fund our get-out-the-vote efforts across Montana. Every dollar we raise will have a direct impact on the results of June 5th.

Peter, Did you see Troy’s message yesterday? This is the last end-of-month deadline our campaign faces before the primary on June 5th, and we need your help to raise $15,000 so we can fully fund our get-out-the-vote efforts across Montana. Every dollar we raise will have a direct impact on the results of June 5th. Help make sure Troy Downing comes out on top in the primary by chipping in right now. Anything you can give -- be it $10 or $100 or more -- will go directly to our get-out-the-vote operations! [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] - Team Downing ---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Troy

Date: Wed, May 23, 2018

Subject: This is it Friend, I announced my candidacy for U.S. Senate back in May of 2017 because I saw the American Dream at risk and I was fed up with how Jon Tester was failing to represent Montanans. Since my announcement I’ve been criss-crossing the state, listening and speaking directly with Montanans, and seeing what can be done to make sure our veterans are served better. Now, after a year of campaigning for your support all across Montana, it’s time to take Montana’s outrage at Jon Tester and put it into action. Everything we do from this point forward is focused on getting people to the polls, and if we want to oust Tester in November, we have to make sure we don’t leave any stone unturned. To make sure our get-out-the-vote efforts are fully funded, we have to raise $15,000 by May 31st. An immediate donation will help to make sure that we reach out to as many voters as possible and get them to the polls to vote! [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] Any amount you can give will help our get-out-the-vote operations and move us one step close to defeating Jon Tester. $10 = funds gas to drive 5 people to to polls [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] $25 = funds knocking on 50 doors [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] $50 = funds 500 calls to voters [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] $100 = funds reaching 5,000 voters online [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] Your support will directly influence what happens on June 5th. Every single vote matters in this election. If we can’t get all of our supporters to the polls, we risk Jon Tester waltzing into another term in November. President Trump doesn’t want that to happen, and I know you don’t either. So please chip in right now and help us raise the $15,000 we need to fully fund our get-out-the-vote efforts. [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] I need your help now more than ever. Called to Serve, Troy Downing P.S - We need to raise $15,000 before the final end-of-month deadline to make sure our get-out-the-vote operations are as strong as possible. Please chip in right now! [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] DONATE [https://troydowning.com/donate/?src=hf_downing_180524_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180524_EoM2] [https://twitter.com/troydowningmt]

PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U.S. SENATE Click here https://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-u-bajthk-yhdyitiujj-f/ to unsubscribe.

name: The White House
subject: Rolling back ‘the disaster of Dodd-Frank’
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79d734e3b7d231022092a59f47322dd25f0bd84b93de408716af398a6631dd82f515b8f673ba3e081d4076ca68dfa6bff4042fee292dd3e6) The White House • May 25, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will deliver the commencement address to the U.S. Naval Academy's 2018 graduating class in Annapolis, Maryland. [Watch live at 10:00 a.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79d734e3b7d2310214f92fe5dd38860bc43543d866e00faf244bba8b635b8cd4387bbc7bacda3823aa670502dc08b8e257e68f42ccbfcba0) |
---
|

## Rolling back 'the disaster of Dodd-Frank'
**Dodd-Frank unfairly harmed the community banks** that serve as the backbone of small business in America. While the big financial institutions used their vast resources to navigate Dodd-Frank's costly and complex regulations, the number of community banks in the United States decreased by 2,000 over the past 8 years.
**Yesterday, rural America and small towns got a boost**. Thanks to the Economic Growth, Regulatory Relief, and Consumer Protection Act that President Trump signed into law, community banks and credit unions will be freed of unnecessary regulatory costs and able to direct more lending to small businesses and consumers. That change is especially crucial for local businesses, many of whom have few other options for credit.
**"Today's legislation is the next step in America's unprecedented economic comeback** ," President Trump said. "As a candidate, I pledged that we would rescue these community banks from Dodd-Frank--the disaster of Dodd-Frank--and now we are keeping that commitment."
[Learn more about this important, bipartisan fix to Dodd-Frank.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79d734e3b7d23102e089d42748c56adda70a58c469d07e4f5d3e9d353c86466a6123fac3832879993893b4d8b8944fcd76a8aa5549fcf040)
**Watch** : [President Trump's full remarks at the signing ceremony ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79d734e3b7d2310263b718d839b690d1f4b4dd23262b26e5f51479946a8027b7a910228d6dcec298a95c6a6c4b2a8f37732719862991c737)

---
|

## 'This time, we will not only plant our flag'
**"This time, we will not only plant our flag and leave our footprint**. We will establish a foundation for an eventual mission to Mars," President Trump says about the next chapter of U.S. space exploration. In an effort led by Vice President Mike Pence, the Administration is reforming out-of-date space policies, already taking significant steps to refocus the Nation's space strategy.
**President Trump's Space Policy Directive - 2, signed yesterday** , ensures America's place as a leader in space commerce--a crucial frontier with stiff global competition. The Directive sets executive branch policy to ensure that any enforced regulations are promoting economic growth, minimizing uncertainty for taxpayers and industry, protecting national security, and encouraging American leadership.
**Within 30 days** , for example, the Commerce Secretary is directed to submit a plan for creating a "one-stop shop" within the Commerce Department for handling all commercial space flight activities.
[See how President Trump will help make America a leader in space commerce.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79d734e3b7d2310254e60c237f91b96d1aff520d32770a365a98ee93fb1423fc431fa6d180b99114e7806dbaa48deccd08ff18f1fa6d0e2d)
**Go deeper** : [America will once again reach for the Moon--and beyond](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79d734e3b7d23102e13a4a797c66a596cf43c29f1a54d124e3f237ac485e48e9263467974eba2a36142df17c7fd620bbdc110e150fbaf911)

subject: Where Will Ian Be Next Week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ian Todd for Congress
body:
Ian and team have been working hard to connect with voters around Minnesota's 6th this past week. Find out more about where he'll be next week.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/8286afaf2893/the-past-week-in-review-45901?e=c56804a14d)

** May 18 - May 25
------------------------------------------------------------

** NEWSLETTER
------------------------------------------------------------

Hi y'all! Below you can find out what Ian and team have been up to, and what's coming up!

Please donate today to help us defeat Tom Emmer.
CONTRIBUTE >>> (https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=06f075dc01&e=c56804a14d)

** Door Knocking
------------------------------------------------------------

Ian and team have been door knocking like crazy since the weather has been so nice. We're inviting anyone who wants to join us along, too! So, if you're ready to hit the doors and let people know how important it is to beat Emmer in November then sign on up! You can sign up to be on our volunteer list here (https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=3b3b9aece0&e=c56804a14d) .

** Parades!
------------------------------------------------------------

It's finally parade season and we're so excited. This Saturday (tomorrow!) we'll be marching together in Zimmerman's Wild West Days. You can find out more info on the Facebook event page (https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=2c78a490f8&e=c56804a14d) and don't forget to join us for a potluck picnic (https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=6557dd9a13&e=c56804a14d) afterwards!

** Get Your Bumper Stickers!
------------------------------------------------------------

#TEAMTODD MERCH >>> (https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=dd1b97ad9e&e=c56804a14d)

============================================================

Filing Day - Join Us!

I promise this will be way more fun than it sounds. We plan on having a group with us as Ian officially files for his candidacy in the 6th district at the capitol! You can find out more info ** here (https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=20538326be&e=c56804a14d)

body:
Peter,
You had Regina’s back this week! Regina was hit with misleading digital attack ads, and we had to respond immediately. Because of you, we were able to do so. Thank you.
This next week is absolutely critical. It’s our last chance to connect with undecided voters. The more resources we have, the more voters we can connect with -- it’s that simple.
CONTRIBUTE NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180525_1_4&amount=25&recurring=AUTO ]
If elected, Regina will spend each and every day standing up for you. But for her to get there, she needs your help. Regina doesn’t take PAC money or special interest cash. She relies on grassroots contributions from everyday Americans. Can she count on you to get her through the homestretch?
CONTRIBUTE NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_digitalad?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180525_1_4&amount=25&recurring=AUTO ]
Thank you so much for all you’ve done for our movement so far. I can’t wait to celebrate our victory in just over a week.
Yours,
Emma

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Our health is not a bargaining chip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
This is unconscionable, Friends.
For years, the GOP has been using every dirty trick in the book to sabotage the Affordable Care Act. Now, having failed to repeal the ACA yet again, President Trump and Senate Republicans are working even harder to undermine the law, driving premium costs so high that some Granite Staters will be forced off their insurance altogether.
**This is incredibly cynical. We should be working across the aisle to improve the law, not tear it down.**
But the GOP has chosen partisan politics over Americans' well-being, even refusing to allow a vote on a bipartisan bill that would make health care more affordable for millions of families.
**I 'm doing all I can to pass this bill so parents won't have to choose between going bankrupt and taking their child to the doctor - but I need you to join this fight as well. [Please click here right now to tell Senate Republicans: Protect Americans' health care!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-our-healthcare/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FCJS-HealthCare%3Fcode%3Djtk855-ja-nd)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

name: Team Donnelly
subject: the short version (for busy people)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Mike's email yesterday was pretty long, but what he had to say was really important. So we broke it down in case you were too busy to read it |
---

| | Hey Peter -- Mike's email yesterday was pretty long, but what he had to say was really important. So we broke it down in case you were too busy to read it **[(and here's a link where you can pitch in)](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91508/2407597313/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=10")**:
1. Ultra-rich campaign donors are spending millions to elect candidates who will **vote in the best interests of their donors** while at the same time stripping Hoosiers of affordable health care, Social Security, and quality public education!
2. They're FURIOUS Joe wouldn't vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and pass McConnell's tax plan -- both of which would take hard-earned money out of Hoosiers' pocketbooks!
3. So they're flooding Indiana with money in support of GOP Rep. Braun -- **through unaccountable groups like KARL ROVE 'S super PAC!**
4. We need your help to execute a winning field strategy and BEAT Rep. Braun in November! >>

| **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91508/2407597313/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=10")**
---
Thanks,
Team Donnelly
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Mike**
Subject: this is long (money in politics)
Hey friend --

This email is about the powerful, wealthy people who use their money to **_rig our elections and line their own pockets_** at the expense of everyday hardworking Hoosiers.

**It 's also about what you can do to help us stop them -- starting with pitching in to Joe's re-election campaign. He's always been an advocate for ending the influence of dark money in politics, and now he's being called one of the nation's most vulnerable incumbents. He's going to need as much help as he can get to prove the pundits wrong in November.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f9150b/2407597313/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91504/2407597313/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91507/2407597313/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91506/2407597313/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?express_lane=true&refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91501/2407597313/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180525.1nd")**
Now about those uber-wealthy campaign donors I mentioned. You hear about them all the time -- people like the Koch brothers. But HOW do they corrupt our political system? Basically, they look at political campaigns as investment opportunities.

**They invest millions of dollars in candidates and campaigns whom they know will pass laws once in office that will make those same donors even richer at the expense of working-class families. That 's how you get laws like the McConnell tax plan -- you invest a million dollars in one senator's campaign and another's, and once they get in office they write you legislation that cuts tens of millions out of your tax bill.**

Joe does it differently. When a bill comes across his desk, he asks himself one question: **_" How will this affect Hoosiers?"_** Joe doesn't work for any campaign donor, president, or political party -- and that's what we should all want in our senator. **But it 's not good enough for Karl Rove, whose dark money group is already spending big in Indiana.**

After Joe stood up to Mitch McConnell's crew and refused to vote for bad legislation like the GOP tax plan and the repeal of the Affordable Care Act, people like Rove were furious. So now they're trying to use their money to defeat Joe and buy Indiana's Senate seat for Rep. Braun, who got rich by cheating workers at his trucking company and then used his position in the legislature to enrich himself.

**If we want a senator who 's accountable to Hoosiers, then we need you to step up and help us fight back against the flood of dark money facing Indiana. [Will you chip in to help us beat Rep. Braun in November? >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91508/2407597313/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Mike Lindburg
Political Director

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91500/2407597313/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defend-joe?refcode=20180525.1nd&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c211a/7377f838/3fdf1228/51f91503/2407597313/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

body:
#
**The Koch brothers** just "unveiled a six-figure advertisement onslaught...Targeted Democrats include Rep. Beto O'Rourke of Texas, who is trying to flip Republican Sen. Ted Cruz's seat."
CNBC | 05/24/18
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ea0/3b1d797/7caeb7e7/35a8748b/1177152844/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180525-EOM1-RS&amount=3")**
Friends,
This is urgent so I wanted to be sure you're kept in the loop: we just got news that the Koch brothers are opening up their massive bank accounts for new ads directly attacking Beto.
With our campaign now polling within _single digits_ of Ted Cruz, you can be sure that the Koch brothers are just getting started as they rally other special interest groups in Cruz's corner.
**[Fighting back against this new Koch attack is going to take all of us working together. We have to raise $100,000 online before midnight on May 31 to reach our end-of-month goal. And with these new Koch ads going live, we truly can't fall short. Help us get there with a donation of $3.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ea0/3b1d797/7caeb7e7/35a8748b/1177152844/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180525-EOM1-RS&amount=3")**
After the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision, the Koch brothers spent over $200 million in the 2016 election to prop up their favorite politicians. And Ted Cruz received more money from members of the Koch brothers' network than any other candidate. But I know they're no match for our grassroots movement.
Unlike Cruz, Beto isn't relying on special interests and PACs to fight for him. Our campaign is powered 100% by regular people pitching in what they can afford in increments of $5, $10, even $50. There are no Koch brothers waiting in the wings, no super PACs or dark-money groups financing our movement. There's no doubt who Beto answers to.
**[Rush a donation of $3 to Beto's campaign to take on Ted Cruz and his special interests today. Help us reach our $100,000 end-of-month goal and fight back against this major attack from the Koch brothers.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ea0/3b1d797/7caeb7e7/35a8748b/1177152844/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180525-EOM1-RS&amount=3")**
We knew this moment would come. And thanks to you, we're going to be ready.
Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

name: Jason Yates
subject: Uplifting Interview - Congresswoman Michele Bachmann
body:
Peter,
I want to share with you an interview My Faith Votes had with Congresswoman Michele Bachmann to discuss the important primary elections, her exciting new ministry work at the United Nations and her passionate charge for Christians today!
Michele Bachmann is a former Congresswoman from Minnesota and candidate for President of the United States.
This conversation we had with Michele is sure to encourage you and it’s timely for us to read in the midst of this busy primary election season!
[Take a few minutes to read Congresswoman Bachmann’s Interview Today!](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fwhat-does-it-mean-to-bring-our-christian-influence-to-the-table%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180525com01&n=1)

**"A new Democratic ad campaign aims to unseat [Devin Nunes] by suggesting that he's advancing his own stardom in Washington.."**_**\- Politico**_ Fellow Conservative, It's classic school yard bullying: anyone who dares to move against the liberal agenda comes under scathing attack from Democrats, leftwing interest groups, and their media cheerleaders. Conservatives are used to this. We're constantly ridiculed simply because we propose different solutions to problems than those advanced by the Democrats and their Hollywood supporters. **Outspoken conservative leaders are torched in the mainstream media, ridiculed on late-night talk shows, and targeted by a galaxy of Democrat donor groups throughout the country.** I have become a favorite target of these groups, who know from long experience that I proudly, outspokenly, and passionately oppose the liberal agenda, and I don't back down when attacked. In fact, the way I see it, the more furiously the Left denounces me, the more likely it is that I'm doing something right. A new leftwing ad campaign against me, which is already receiving sympathetic, nationwide coverage in the mainstream media, is just another sign of how badly liberals want to take me out of the battle. _**My opponents rely on the mainstream media. By contrast, I rely on people like you.**_ I'm fighting for Americans who believe in conservatism and who want representatives in Congress who can't be swayed by media attacks, no matter how widespread or constant they are. name: Clarke Tucker
subject: health care cost increases
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for Congress
body:
Wow -- I just read a report that our health care premiums could increase 15% next year. As a cancer survivor, I am devastated to know that a parent might opt to skip a routine medical screening so they can afford their kid's baseball uniform or that a grandparent might skip expensive medication to ensure they can keep the lights and air conditioning on.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/y8oo1lMSjp75bFhsbd76rfuTDw4d7Qb8i1LpfO8lbPY=/63nfY3Ash1Kfq_IMqHpvmHi_lF2lk_gJGvW4CTn_1io=?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

**Wow -- I just read a report that _our health care premiums could increase 15% next year._**

As a cancer survivor, I am devastated to know that a parent might opt to skip a routine medical screening so they can afford their kid's baseball uniform or that a grandparent might skip expensive medication to ensure they can keep the lights and air conditioning on.

But I know that's what these kinds of premium hikes can do to families. It is gut-wrenching, and it should not have to be this way. **Arkansas 's families shouldn't have to choose between going to the doctor and putting food on the table.**

And that's why I'm running. The vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and the vote that threw the health care market into chaos that could result in this 15% premium hike was irresponsible and against our interests in Arkansas's 2nd District. As your next representative, I pledge to work with both parties to make sure health care is accessible and affordable for everyone.

[I hope you'll chip in to this campaign today so we can get to work on fixing our health care system](https://act.myngp.com/el/y8oo1lMSjp75bFhsbd76rfuTDw4d7Qb8i1LpfO8lbPY=/hQkGs2XasZNGeeFq35Ieh8UXVkeFqC3AOWpBQGtrHhU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.25_b1_ct_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) \-- there is nothing more important than our health and the health of our loved ones. Let's fight for it.

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: What a living wage means
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Let's invest in our middle class.
#

Friend --
It's been more than a decade since Congress has raised the federal minimum wage -- it's currently just $7.25/hour.
Here in Maryland, we're doing a bit better with a $9.25/hour minimum wage, but it's still not enough. That's why Ben is fighting to raise the minimum wage in Maryland to $15/hour, so that everyone who works hard is paid a living wage.
**[Add your name next to mine if you believe the people of Maryland deserve a raise today -- let's work together toward a $15 minimum wage.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62c/7ab0e2c4/7f8cb43d/349bbdcd/2037495919/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/give-marylanders-a-raise?source=OHQ05258A")**
We know too many folks here in Maryland struggle to pay for the rising costs of housing, education, and healthcare. Ensuring that every job pays a living wage means we're investing in our middle class, which means we are investing in our economy.
We can't afford to waste more time: Larry Hogan promised to "Change Maryland" when he was elected, but all we've done is stand still.
Adjusting for inflation, when each month's average hourly wage and average hours worked data is accumulated over his tenure as governor, the average Marylander has **lost $768.31 in reduced earnings** compared to a 2014 baseline. In comparison, the average American has earned $3,441.73 more, the average Virginian $7,554.65, the average Pennsylvanian $2,263.60, and the average Delawarean $8,951.77.
Ben knows that building a stronger Maryland means building a stronger economy -- that starts with paying a living wage to folks who work hard every single day.
**[It's time to invest in our middle class: Add your name if you're ready for a $15 minimum wage in Maryland.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a62c/7ab0e2c4/7f8cb43d/349bbdcd/2037495919/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/give-marylanders-a-raise?source=OHQ05258A")**
Thanks,
Jerusalem

Ben Jealous for Governor

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Trump's attacking you, too
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | There's no denying what this means, you know. A new poll published in the _Sun-Sentinel_ shows President Trump's approval on the rise in Florida. Combine that with his attacks against me on Twitter, and that could equal a tough few months ahead of us. I need your help to push back against whatever attacks and smears come our way. [**_Can you help by giving $5, $10, or whatever you can toward our $20,000 May goal?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fd5/622b7b5b/1ac4e36d/307b8304/4211632803/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180517d?refcode=dwse180517d_a&recurring=true&amount=5") The truth is President Trump does not like me because the truth hurts. The truth is that he's coming after me because I'm an outspoken opponent of his agenda. And his tweets will not silence me. **When he and his allies in Congress threaten Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, I fight back.** I protect seniors, the disabled, retirees, and all the Florida families that rely on those safety nets for security and prosperity. **When Trump and his allies try to repeal access to affordable health care, which as you know happens a lot, I fight back.** No one should have to worry that one illness or accident will drive their family into bankruptcy. **When Trump and his allies try to defund Planned Parenthood and women's health clinics, I fight back.** Women deserve access to whatever reproductive care they, their families, and their doctors decide they need. Those are just some of the things I believe in -- and some of the things we fight for together on Team DWS. **When Trump attacks me, he's attacking you, too.** I fight back on behalf of Florida families. It's my job. But in order to succeed in blocking Trump's dangerous agenda, I need you on my side. [**_So let's keep fighting back together by hitting this $20,000 May goal. Give what you can, whatever amount that is._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fd5/622b7b5b/1ac4e36d/307b8304/4211632803/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180517d?refcode=dwse180517d_a&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for your help today. Debbie

body:
Hi Peter,

We are in the final stretch before the Primary, Abigail is running strong, and our momentum is building by the day. She's traveling up and down the district, meeting families across the 7th, and being warmly and enthusiastically received everywhere she goes. There's excitement and hope in the air.

On **May 30th** from 6-8 pm a group of supporters are hosting a **Pre-Primary Meet & Greet** for Abigail at the Fine Creek Brewery located at 2425 Robert E. Lee Road in Powhatan. There will be a cash bar and plenty of great appetizers. Come join us and Abigail and chat with friends and neighbors about the things that really matter. [Please RSVP here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/pkLn7g3NxlsO0DQNxKN-xyEyOeP2ABCGykMNWhBA1Tc=/do12mDl4ZpOC1misgJs1i226nwI1obUCDxuYI8diD6Y=)

On Sunday **June 3rd** from 2-4 pm please join Abigail for the **" In His Grill" Pizza Party Extravaganza.** Like the name? You'll really like the delicious pizza and the great conversation with Abigail about politics and policy even more. [Please RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/pkLn7g3NxlsO0DQNxKN-xyEyOeP2ABCGykMNWhBA1Tc=/YCEerLVAz3HSfExhScyfa-Gt7mciE3y55EIvY119TL4=) and head on out to the organic Broadfork Farm at 9501 Deer Range Road in Chesterfield. Bring the kids -- they love pizza!

On **June 4th** from 5:30-8 pm we'll be grilling at our **' Bergers Over Brats Picnic Rally** at Deep Run Park, Shelters 4 & 5\. Bring a covered dish and chairs; we've got the rest. [Please RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/pkLn7g3NxlsO0DQNxKN-xyEyOeP2ABCGykMNWhBA1Tc=/kEW3Q8r9VnwcBlAYHU0MWMrwLxhTOSjbEffM0h2MUWI=). Also you can help by volunteering at the link to make this event a success.

And one more great event. **Civil Rights Activist and Lawyer Clarence Dunnaville** is opening his home in Chesterfield on **June 9th** from 6-7:30 pm for a meet & greet to all who want one more chance to meet Abigail! [Please RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/pkLn7g3NxlsO0DQNxKN-xyEyOeP2ABCGykMNWhBA1Tc=/V0fY5qqiNTaFeW2Ulja7kGUQcMULmd4WLZaA0ig66fM=) for the address. We will keep the RSVP link open until we have reach the limit of capacity for his home.

Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions, and I hope to see you at an event!

Thank you,

-Mary Jo Sheeley
Campaign Volunteer

P.S. Remember to vote on June 12!!!!

name: Governor Phil Bredesen
subject: It’s no secret we have an opioid crisis in Tennessee.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
It’s no secret we have an opioid crisis in Tennessee. It’s killing more people in our state than car accidents.
Opioid-related hospitalizations for our state’s seniors have tripled in the last 10 years. And we’re ranked third-highest in the country for opioid use, with more than one prescription for every man, woman, and child in Tennessee.
There is no shortage of Washington politicians who have promised to take this issue on. But like many issues facing our country, progress has gotten lost in the chaos and partisan rancor that dominates Washington. That must change.
[**Will you sign our petition demanding Congress put aside the bickering and focus on fighting back against the opioid crisis? No one can change Washington unless we try, so we need to make our voices heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1282165/7047698/-796030874?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZkNGYzZC01ZDYwLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OeFSQNWvjbtkZUemcbhI99DYKLp2Z8P1Z8oyj9s9Egk=&ref=em180525-opioids)
[Sign our petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1282166/7047699/-796030874?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZkNGYzZC01ZDYwLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OeFSQNWvjbtkZUemcbhI99DYKLp2Z8P1Z8oyj9s9Egk=&ref=em180525-opioids)
It’s wrong that an epidemic claiming the lives of tens of thousands can end up on the back burner of Washington’s agenda.
Making your voice heard sends a powerful message that it’s time to end the squabbling and focus on issues that matter. I know that by working together, we can change Congress’s culture of division and dysfunction.
Thanks for everything you do,
— Phil

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Taking our case to the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We have a long way to go before the New York State Democratic Party becomes the grassroots party it should be.
#
Peter -
Yesterday at the New York State Democratic Convention, the party establishment nominated their preferred candidate to be automatically put on the ballot.
We went there to make our case, and we fought hard for every vote. But honestly, we expected this. We have a long way to go before the New York State Democratic Party becomes the grassroots party it should be. A lot of these party insiders like the system the way it is.
Even the DNC Chair broke the committee's own principle of not endorsing in primaries by putting his thumb on the scale for Cuomo. I've never been welcome in Andrew Cuomo's party, so we know what that will mean for the Attorney General's race.
For us, this just means that we're going to petition our way onto the ballot. It's our chance to take our case directly to the people -- the ones who will ultimately decide this election.
We'll be in touch in the coming weeks with how you can help us collect signatures, but right now, we have another ask of you.
Today, we need you to help us grow our movement and prepare to launch a statewide petitioning drive. So, I have to ask:
**[Peter - Thank you so much for joining our grassroots campaign. But we need you to take the next step. Can we count on you to make your first online donation today? Any amount-- even $5 -- will help us reach more New Yorkers and grow our movement.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e39/6e822e2f/18ae599f/41721d1e/3742754204/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-ballot-petition?refcode=em180525-full")**
It's disappointing that in a state like New York we still have to fight a Democratic establishment that refuses to fight for the people and embrace progressive values. But if we all pitch in and work together, we can change that. The old structures can't last.
Thank you for everything you do.
Best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e39/6e822e2f/18ae599f/41721d1e/3742754204/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-ballot-petition?refcode=em180525-full")

| Congress must act to prevent gun violence.
---
|
---
| We've all heard the statistics by now: for the past five years, American schools are averaging a shooting every week. 300 shootings since 2013.
We've listened to the gut-wrenching stories, and the pleas for action, from parents, students, and others, horrified by the reality of our situation. We are rising up to say we've had enough, and to demand bold, specific action from Congress: stand up to the gun lobby, and fight the plague that's ripping through our towns and schools.
But when it comes to Rep. Ann Wagner, our demands have been ignored, and the NRA has made contributions of over $15,000 to Wagner's campaigns. [The fight is on, and it's important we are heard above the NRA's noise. Help us raise $15,000 -- not from special interest groups -- but from concerned, genuine voters like you who want to bring change.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GPd2VM6-a44uUHNTL-L6onDWQpbDW5tXtde6PzalZN4SSX5-1w2EAnbt7NoUHdxd0f81ni4-B4ohSjdfcm1ZdjaAjwFLzVSv9ykOaE8cmwl8AMJ1jL_N-KQ5bcx1Y7OP0sillluqIctJX6DmjVuP4KPGCbPpQblr87AuDGegPhvOXM02fBEkInXTCbyfnxznlVLYqhmeBuNPPsIYAWWd4fc1Z3a-EoBOqSeUu_hYnsAbDsnQOU2Blw==&c=Q1W7wtqSqvS4UQrdrOGRDokVz0PGA9tLCI_bPuJHmKReyaDAEswp_A==&ch=RHMtDos84UTp5AYaua1hNzEdniusJd69tczdfXn2fHf1s7Zg0qb9cQ==)
Wagner thinks the answer to gun violence is more guns. She has a 93% rating from the NRA, and she never thinks twice before cashing their checks. The NRA's PAC, the NRA Political Victory Fund, has raised $2.4 Million in this year's first quarter alone.
Republicans like Ann Wagner won't stop taking NRA money, and they won't stop voting against progress. [That's why we're building a powerful coalition to beat Ann Wagner in November, and it's why we're asking for your help.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GPd2VM6-a44uUHNTL-L6onDWQpbDW5tXtde6PzalZN4SSX5-1w2EAnbt7NoUHdxd0f81ni4-B4ohSjdfcm1ZdjaAjwFLzVSv9ykOaE8cmwl8AMJ1jL_N-KQ5bcx1Y7OP0sillluqIctJX6DmjVuP4KPGCbPpQblr87AuDGegPhvOXM02fBEkInXTCbyfnxznlVLYqhmeBuNPPsIYAWWd4fc1Z3a-EoBOqSeUu_hYnsAbDsnQOU2Blw==&c=Q1W7wtqSqvS4UQrdrOGRDokVz0PGA9tLCI_bPuJHmKReyaDAEswp_A==&ch=RHMtDos84UTp5AYaua1hNzEdniusJd69tczdfXn2fHf1s7Zg0qb9cQ==)
Thanks, take care, and see you on the trail.
-Mark

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: In the Spirit of Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=98A119A9A3663)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=98A119A9A3664)
---
| | Friends,

As we head into the Memorial Day weekend, I wanted to share with you the news that the House passed the National Defense Authorization Act this week. This important bill authorizes funding for the Department of Defense and the many critical military programs on which our men and women in uniform rely.
I was proud to vote in favor of this legislation because I know how important it is that Congress provide our military with every tool they need to do their jobs and keep our country safe. I will always work to ensure that our military is properly funded.
I'm honored to have had the opportunity to get to know so many veterans across AL-02, and I hope you'll take a minute to [watch and share the video of one these outstanding veterans in our community](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=98A119A9A3665). I'm truly grateful to have his support.
In the spirit of Memorial Day, please join me in thanking our service members for their dedication and commitment to our great country. To the families of those who paid the ultimate price for our freedom: Thank you for your sacrifice.

Happy Memorial Day,
Martha

subject: get involved this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|

| Team,

The primary election is now less than 100 days away -- and we need your help to get out the vote!

This weekend we are kicking off a summer of activism where we will be registering voters, signing up Democrats to vote by mail, and knocking on doors to ensure a "blue wave" in November!

There are over 40 events happening in 23 counties across the state this weekend, and I am excited to get to participate in some of these events.

[**Click here to find an event in your community.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4be8f/1a5213b3/6de68d9a/718acb95/3492111692/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/floridadems/?zip=34223&date=2018-05-26&max_dist=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+find+an+event+in+your+comm&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1&source=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1") [](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4be8f/1a5213b3/6de68d9a/718acb94/3492111692/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/floridadems/?zip=34223&date=2018-05-26&max_dist=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1&source=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1") The honest truth, friends, is that without ensuring Democrats get out and vote this fall, Trump, Rick Scott, and the Florida GOP will win big.

This past year has shown us that the 2018 midterms will be the election of a lifetime -- a chance to help both our nation and our state to "course correct" from the damage Trump and Rick Scott have done.

[**That is why we need to make sure as many Democrats as possible turn out to vote. Can you click here and RSVP for an event in Englewood?**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4be8f/1a5213b3/6de68d9a/718acb97/3492111692/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/floridadems/?zip=34223&date=2018-05-26&max_dist=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+we+need+to+make+sure+as+many&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1&source=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_INV_180DO_180525_1_1")

Thanks,

Terrie

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Remembering our heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Our soldiers are truly the epitome of the American spirit. Josh Hawley
Hello Peter,

As you know, this Monday is Memorial Day. While many will be spending time with their loved ones, we cannot forget that this day, as well as our freedom, are only possible thanks to the selfless service members who have paid the ultimate price defending our nation.

Our soldiers are truly the epitome of the American spirit. They dedicate their lives to protecting ours, and often receive little to no thanks in return.

Today, and every day, we should be working as a nation to give the members of our military, and their families, the support and gratitude that they deserve.

So while many of us are enjoying a day off of work, let us not forget what this day is really about: remembering the dedication and sacrifice of our men and women in uniform.

Sincerely,

Josh Hawley

Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Jeffrey Carson
subject: Endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, I'm excited to share another endorsement with you! Former Cole County Sheriff Greg White has officially endorsed Austin for U.S. Senate. Austin's strong defense of the principles of liberty and his stances on criminal justice reform are making waves. The United States has 5% of the world's population but 25% of the world's prison population. Clearly something has to change. We have far too many people in prison for victimless crimes, and it is costing taxpayers tens of billions of dollars a year — money that could be better spent on taking care of our servicemembers and veterans or paying down our national debt. Thank you, Sheriff White for fighting for liberty and showing how a man can make a difference in his community. We'll make you proud. If you're interested in seeing all the other endorsements in one place, we have a new page on our website specifically devoted to the amazing people who have pledged their support for Austin in this race! subject: It's unusual
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ | [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff239/1953774098/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME")
---

\-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dear Friend, Thank you for joining our movement for progress. Team Abrams' record-shattering win in the May primary election was the result of hard work, a healthy disregard for the impossible, and a new Democratic playbook that invests in and reaches out to every community. We defied expectations by putting people first - and building a diverse coalition of support that truly looks like Georgia._ We are ready to imagine more for ourselves and expect more from our leaders. _ **But to win in November against a well-funded Republican opponent, I will need your help.** **Please pledge to support our people-powered campaign - whether you promise to chip in what you can, volunteer your time, or share our message with your friends.** ********[Help #TeamAbrams talk to voters »](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff246/1953774098/VEsE/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/Volunteer-Welcome-Series?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Help+TeamAbrams+talk+to+votersnbsp+raquo&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME")******** ********[Share our vision on social media »](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff247/1953774098/VEsF/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/Digi-Ambs-Welcome-Series?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+Share+our+vision+on+social+medianbsp+raq&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME")******** ********[Chip in $3 right now »](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff244/1953774098/VEsC/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/Donate-Welcome-Series?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+3+right+nownbsp+raquo&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME")******** Team Abrams beat the odds because we never stopped fighting for progress, even in the face of doubt. The pundits criticized our campaign because it did not look like a traditional Democratic campaign. They were right: _Our campaign looks like Georgia. _ **Nothing about this campaign is business as usual.** It is unusual for a little Black girl from Gulfport, Mississippi to grow up to become the highest-ranking Democrat in Georgia and the first Black woman nominee for Governor in America. My parents made tremendous sacrifices to give my siblings and me a chance to defy the odds. Despite growing up in poverty in the segregated South, because of sheer force of will they raised two Ph.D.'s, a social worker, and a federal judge. Not everyone can do the same alone. As a community, we must take huge leaps and fight with all our might to achieve success for every single family in our state. **Will you jump with me? Our campaign is building an unusual -- and extraordinary -- organizing program that depends on your grassroots support to win in November. I hope you will stand with us today. ** [**https://secure.staceyabrams.com/Stand-With-Stacey**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff245/1953774098/VEsD/ "https://abrams.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-stacey-abrams?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+httpssecurestaceyabramscomStandWithStace&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME") My whole life has been a story of imagining more for myself than what others expected of me. This campaign is about talking to voters who nobody bothers talking to so that we can come together and demand better opportunities for ourselves. It is about believing that our capacity to succeed -- and not just survive -- is limitless if we fight for every Georgian the way my parents fought for me. Our victory in the May primary election was only the beginning. The road to November will be long and tough, but the next step is one we take together. Thank you, Stacey Abrams **P.S. Be sure to follow the campaign on[Facebook](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff242/1953774098/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=6+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME"), [Twitter](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff243/1953774098/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=7+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME"), and [Instagram](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa18/34a064cc/8b484ef/70ff240/1953774098/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=8+-+Instagram&utm_campaign=IE052518WELCOME&source=IE052518WELCOME")!**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Add your name to raise the wage:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
$7.25 is not enough. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48985/c1f7015/6840c05a/11436568/3346315849/VEsH/ "https://www.tinaforminnesota.com/raise-the-minimum-wage?utm_source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&utm_campaign=minimum-wage&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Eleven years ago today was the last time Congress voted to raise the federal minimum wage. And we know that the minimum wage is not a living wage: At just $7.25 an hour, 60 minutes of work might just barely buy a fast food meal. Add in rent, bills, health care, and the other general costs of living, no wonder so many Americans are struggling. I championed a minimum wage increase in Minnesota that was signed into law -- but we need to be doing more for Americans across the country. That's why, as your senator, I signed on to the _Raise the Wage Act_ , introduced by Patty Murray and Bernie Sanders. [**Add your name to demand a minimum wage increase today.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48985/c1f7015/6840c05a/11436568/3346315849/VEsE/ "https://www.tinaforminnesota.com/raise-the-minimum-wage?utm_source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&utm_campaign=minimum-wage&utm_medium=ema") During his presidential campaign, Donald Trump agreed: He said he honestly didn't know how people survive on just $7.25 an hour. But he has no plans to address it at the federal level. Instead, he's abandoned those that are struggling. More than two million Americans earn $7.25 or less an hour. And while the GOP may want you to believe those earning that wage are kids working part time after school to earn some extra cash, we know that the average minimum wage worker is 35 years old. Fifty-six percent are women, and 55% work full time. They deserve more. [**Join me and add your name next to mine if you want to see a minimum wage increase.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48985/c1f7015/6840c05a/11436568/3346315849/VEsF/ "https://www.tinaforminnesota.com/raise-the-minimum-wage?utm_source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&utm_campaign=minimum-wage&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Tina Smith | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48985/c1f7015/6840c05a/11436568/3346315849/VEsC/ "https://www.tinaforminnesota.com/raise-the-minimum-wage?utm_source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&source=ema_2018-05-25_minimum-wage&utm_campaign=minimum-wage&utm_medium=ema")

**Bob Hugin: Family Man, Business Leader, Marine Veteran.**

Thank you for signing up to join Team Hugin! We’re grateful you’ve decided to join Bob in his campaign to become New Jersey’s next Senator. He’s running to ensure that the opportunity to live the American Dream is available for future generations growing up in every single community in our great state. New Jersey deserves a Senator as good as its people.

**Get to know Bob:**
\- Born and raised in Union City
\- Grew up in a diverse, hard-working neighborhood, where his parents instilled in him an obligation to serve others
\- Served as an infantry officer in the Marine Corps from 1976 to 1983
\- B.A. from Princeton University, MBA from University of Virginia
\- Married for 30 years to his wife Kathy
\- Three children: Hilary, Mac, and Robbie
\- Job creator, businessman, leader
\- A lifetime of service to community and country

**What Bob Hugin will change in Washington:**
\- Oppose any new taxes on New Jerseyans
\- Lower your taxes while preserving your State and Local Tax (SALT) Deduction
\- Reform healthcare to make it more affordable and accessible
\- Support the Gateway Tunnel and improve New Jersey’s aging infrastructure
\- Provide more support for our veterans and active duty servicemen and women
\- Make college more affordable for New Jerseyans

**Help Bob serve New Jersey and make New Jerseyans proud of their Senator – _get involved._**
|

body:

---
| |
---
| **_Reflection_** As we enter Memorial Day weekend, I know I'm looking forward to some time spent with family. Many of you will be heading out to the Indianapolis Motor Speedway, taking part in the greatest spectacle in racing.

This weekend, though, I hope you'll also join me in a time of reflection. Let's reflect in reverence on the true meaning of Memorial Day, contemplating on those who have made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our great country. And let's also take some time to reflect on today's horrible school shooting in Noblesville, and our law enforcement and first responders who always answer the call.

Everyday, I'm thankful for our active duty military servicemen and women, our veterans, our law enforcement, and our first responders. With their choice to serve, they are carrying the torch of freedom and safety for us as Americans and for people around the world. Without them, I know we wouldn't be the strong, prosperous, and mighty country that we are today.

Here in Indiana, we're lucky to be served in statewide and Congressional office by several veterans. The next time you see Governor Eric Holcomb, Senator Todd Young, Congressman Jim Banks, Congressman Larry Bucshon, U.S. House of Representatives candidate State Rep. Jim Baird, or U.S. House of Representatives candidate Greg Pence, please stop and thank them for their service to our country. Freedom is not free; it is paid for by those who serve. Thank you veterans, and please have a great Memorial Day weekend!

-Kyle Hupfer

_Pictured: Chairman Kyle Hupfer gives an impassioned speech at Monday night's 2018 Indiana Republican Party Spring Dinner -- reminding Hoosier Republicans that they'll be the difference-makers in this year's important elections._

| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
---

| **_Taking Indiana to the World!_** This week, Governor Eric Holcomb visited SIX countries across Europe - the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Switzerland, Austria, Germany, and France - all with the goal of boosting Indiana’s economy!

>From meetings, to roundtables, to receptions, and more, Governor Holcomb spent the week meeting with European companies that have operations in Indiana - companies like Fronius, Nestlé, and Roche - along with companies that are considering locating and creating jobs in Indiana. European businesses are responsible for about 113,900 Hoosier jobs today...which, with trips like this, will only continue to grow! And deepening this bond even further, Governor Holcomb returned to Indiana today on the first EVER nonstop transatlantic flight from Europe to Indiana!
---

| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Creating Great Jobs for Hoosiers & Americans_**
Conservative outsider Mike Braun has an outstanding record when it comes to business! Starting with only one truck, one salesman, one driver, and himself, Mike turned a small Indiana business into a national company.

With more than 800 American workers in 65 locations, Mike knows firsthand what we need to do to support Hoosier manufacturing, grow our economy, and attract more great-paying jobs to Indiana. New hires at his company have a starting salary that is nearly double the minimum wage, with lots of opportunities for upward mobility and wage growth!

To learn more about the record of Mike Braun’s family-owned business – and how it stacks up against the record of Democrat Joe Donnelly’s family business –visit [www.meyermeansfamily.com](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=20fac1d832&e=1acd9bb3d6).

| **_2018 Indiana Republican State Convention:
Just Two Weeks Away_**
Just two weeks! The 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention - which is being held outside Indiana's capital city for just the second time in Hoosier history - is coming to Evansville on June 8th and 9th.

If you're a delegate to convention, congratulations! Please make sure you've [paid your delegate fee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=91e9068b53&e=1acd9bb3d6), and that you've [booked your hotel](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5978b7d561&e=1acd9bb3d6) in Evansville (they're going fast!). And if you missed the delegate deadline, there's still time to [apply to be a guest](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e2b8b628c5&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Please continue to check back to our convention website - [Indiana.gop/stateconvention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f045a40f3b&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- which is updated regularly with important information about this year's big event!!

From meetings, to roundtables, to receptions, and more, Governor Holcomb spent the week meeting with European companies that have operations in Indiana - companies like Fronius, Nestlé, and Roche - along with companies that are considering locating and creating jobs in Indiana. European businesses are responsible for about 113,900 Hoosier jobs today...which, with trips like this, will only continue to grow! And deepening this bond even further, Governor Holcomb returned to Indiana today on the first EVER nonstop transatlantic flight from Europe to Indiana! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Creating Great Jobs for Hoosiers & Americans Conservative outsider Mike Braun has an outstanding record when it comes to business! Starting with only one truck, one salesman, one driver, and himself, Mike turned a small Indiana business into a national company. With more than 800 American workers in 65 locations, Mike knows firsthand what we need to do to support Hoosier manufacturing, grow our economy, and attract more great-paying jobs to Indiana. New hires at his company have a starting salary that is nearly double the minimum wage, with lots of opportunities for upward mobility and wage growth! name: Team Kaine Survey
subject: [Brief Survey] Do you think Scott Pruitt should be removed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1329/3e0906/67916d15/3e34c3c2/1084457219/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS&source=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS")

| | **39 senators have called for the resignation of Scott Pruitt as Environmental Protection Agency administrator.**

[Click here to answer a few questions for us on Pruitt, the environment, and the future of the EPA >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1329/3e0906/67916d15/3e34c3c1/1084457219/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/pruitt-survey?source=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+answer+a+few+questions+for&utm_campaign=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS")
* * *
Derek -

**This is the first time ever - in all of American history - for this many Senators to sign on to a resolution formally calling for a cabinet official 's resignation.**

That's how bad Scott Pruitt is - for the EPA, for taxpayers, for our country.

Tim voted against Scott Pruitt's confirmation to begin with - Pruitt was always the wrong choice to defend public health and the environment. His moves to almost entirely abolish the Chesapeake Bay Program prove that he does NOT represent the interests of Virginians.

And at the end of last month, Tim joined colleague Mark Warner and 37 other Senators in introducing a resolution calling for the immediate resignation of EPA Administrator Scott Pruitt.

We believe action is necessary in response to Pruitt's repeated ethics violations, misuse of taxpayer dollars, and contempt for science.

[We want you to add your name in support of action against Pruitt and answer a few questions about his performance while heading the EPA >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1329/3e0906/67916d15/3e34c3c0/1084457219/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/pruitt-survey?source=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+We+want+you+to+add+your+name+in+support+&utm_campaign=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS")

Not only is Pruitt fundamentally at odds with the agency he is supposed to protect, he is now _constantly_ in the news for misusing taxpayer funds.

From unjustified first class flights, to leasing an apartment from an energy lobbyist, to disciplining employees who raised questions about all this, **we have had enough.**

[During his tenure Pruitt has shown no regard for public trust or ethical standards required for him to carry out the post. It's time for him to resign. Click here to help us continue to push back against Pruitt's abuse of power >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1329/3e0906/67916d15/3e34c3c7/1084457219/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/pruitt-survey?source=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+During+his+tenure+Pruitt+has+shown+no+re&utm_campaign=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS")

Looking forward to going through your responses,

_Team Kaine for Virginia Policy Team_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Stop-Pruitt-Survey](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1329/3e0906/67916d15/3e34c3c6/1084457219/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/pruitt-survey?source=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuretimkainecomStopPruittSurvey&utm_campaign=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS") | [**TAKE SURVEY >>**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1329/3e0906/67916d15/3e34c3c5/1084457219/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/pruitt-survey?source=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+TAKE+SURVEYnbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180525_1_SURV_TEAM_Pruitt-RS")
